TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Skaru, title = Skaru, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Skaru} }

S.FORM: alang Skaru ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 78 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 61 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 37%, saySiyat 3%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. pzyux iyal sqi nya syaw tuqi na Skaru. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Skaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Skaru hya' ga Sansaru. tay mkyahu' na Skaru hya' ga Kukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Skaru ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 78 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 61 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 91 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 37%, saySiyat 3%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. pzyux iyal sqi nya syaw tuqi na Skaru. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Skaru hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Skaru hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Skaru hya' ga Sansaru. tay mkyahu' na Skaru hya' ga Kukung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕkaru ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. pzjux ijal s~ɕqi nja s~ɕjaw tuqi na s~ɕkaru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕans~ɕaru. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕkaru ħjaʔ ɣa kukuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
